title: zeia canina
intro: Zeia canina, a flowering plant also known as the "dog rose," is a species of rose native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The medicinal properties of Zeia canina lie in its leaves, stems, and flowers, which are rich in vitamin C, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Zeia canina include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats. Zeia canina can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, capsules, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
